title: Stop Trading Order Blocks (Do This Instead) | R2F Trading 2026
description: Everyone's hunting order blocks — and getting stopped out. Here's the one thing funded traders check first before every entry. R2F Trading breaks down the exact setup on a live chart. Follow for daily ICT breakdowns → r2ftrading.com
script: Stop hunting order blocks. Seriously. 73% of retail traders get swept before price even touches one. There's a reason. And funded traders already know it. Look at this DXY chart. Price sweeps buyside liquidity — that trendline high everyone sees. Then it drops. Classic. But where did smart money actually enter? Not the order block. One level above it. The R2F Trading system calls it the liquidity magnet. Price hunts the obvious level first. Clears the stops. Then the real move starts. You don't enter at the block. You enter after the sweep confirms. That one shift? Changed everything. Follow R2F Trading for setups like this every single day. Link in bio at r2ftrading.com.
